title: ostruthium officinale
intro: Ostruthium officinale, also known as Bear's Breech or Cephalaria, is a flowering plant species in the honeysuckle family, Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ostruthium officinale include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as acting as a natural expectorant to aid in the clearance of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Ostruthium officinale can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
